infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TheSeniorguru uses location to help trusted people monitor safety when the senior enables live tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TheSeniorguru uses background location to detect safe-zone exits and notify trusted people during safety events.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: TheSeniorguru uses phone motion analytics to identify possible falls and unusual movement patterns.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: TheSeniorguru reads approved health data such as heart rate, oxygen, breathing, sleep, steps, and calories to support senior safety alerts.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: TheSeniorguru does not write health data by default; this permission is reserved for future senior-approved health updates.

plugins.healthSharePermission: TheSeniorguru reads approved health data such as heart rate, oxygen, breathing, sleep, steps, and calories to support senior safety alerts.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: TheSeniorguru does not write health data by default; this permission is reserved for future senior-approved health updates.
